headline: Trump 🍊👑 Taps MMA Beast Mullin 🥊🔥 for DHS THICC DEPORT Throne 💥🚔
text:
Oklahoma RUGGED REPUB 🐂🇺🇸 Senator Markwayne MULLIN 🥊😤 – the ex-MMA FIGHTER 🥋👊 who CHOKES OUT OPPONENTS like THICC STEAKS 🍖💪 – faces SENATE GRILLING 🔥📺 Wednesday at 9:30 ET 🕐⚖️! Trump 🍊🤑 just AXED 👋 Kristi NOEM 🐄😩 after her MINNESOTA IMMO MESS 🚔💥 where FEDS 💼🔫 smoked TWO US PATS Renee Good & Alex Pretti 🕊️🇺🇸 during PROTESTS 🤬🪧 – Noem & CBP BOSS Greg Bovino 🧔📉 (who QUIT Monday 🙌) called 'em DOMESTIC TERROR CUCKS 🤡💣 right after BANG BANG 🔫💨!

Mullin stepping in to WHIP DHS 🛡️🚀 – that 9/11 BIRTHED 🐣💥 beast from 2002 packing CBP 🚔🇲🇽, ICE ❄️🧊 DEPORT DADDIES, TSA ✈️😩 airport LINE HELL due to SHUTDOWN SAGA 📉🛑, Coast Guard ⛵🦈, Secret Service 🕶️🔫, FEMA 🌪️🏠! Dems 😭🔵 DEMANDING REFORMS on Trump's MASS DEPORT ORGY 🚀👽 – expect SENATORS to ROAST 🔥 Mullin on BORDER WALL LAW & ORDER 🍊🧱 while queues SNAKE 🐍✈️ cuz FUNDING FIGHT 💸🤼!

If committee SIMPS 🤝, full Senate VOTE 🚀 later this month – just 51-49 MAJORITY 🍑📈 to LOCK IT IN! Mullin, 10YR HOUSE VET 🏛️➡️ SENATE SPECIAL ELECTION WIN 🏆, Trump's LOYAL PUP 🐶🍆 hyping DETAIN DREAMS 👮‍♂️🔒: 'POTUS delivered SAFEST BORDER EVER 🛡️🇺🇸 – ready to SAFEGUARD with PATRIOT PALS 👨‍✈️💪!' Posted on X 🐦💨 March 5th.

Noem got SACKED 😭👋 after tense HEARINGS 🔥📺 on Operation Metro Surge 🚔🌽 in North Star State 🧀❄️ – Trump swapped her for BORDER CZAR Tom Homan 🧔🚀 who SHUT IT DOWN 🛑 quick, then REASSIGNED to 'Shield of the Americas' FANCY TITLE 🛡️🌎 like a CONSOLATION PRIZE 🥉😏! Mullin bringing FIERY FISTS 🥊😡 to fix TSA MELTDOWN 😩🛫, ICE RAIDS ❄️👻, and DEM DEPORT DRAMA 🤡🚫 – Wall Street bets 📈 he PUMMELS questions like UFC champ 🏆🥇! Senate simps ready to TAG IN or TAP OUT? 👀💥‼️
